title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang says Marvell could be the next trillion-dollar company; stock jumps 22%
summary_full: Nvidia's CEO, Jensen Huang, hailed this chip designer as the next trillion-dollar firm, sending its shares up sharply in early market trading.
summary_public: Nvidia's CEO, Jensen Huang, hailed this chip designer as the next trillion-dollar firm, sending its shares up sharply in early market trading.
